content: Provide structured errors for HTTP responses with fields: StatusCode (int): HTTP status code (e.g., 404, 500); Code (string): Machine-readable error code (e.g., not_found); Message (string): Human-readable error message.
Preserve stack trace information for unexpected or unhandled errors.
Separate business errors (controlled errors) from internal errors (traceable).
HTTPError represents controlled errors that map directly to an HTTP response.
HTTPError Should be used for validation errors, not found errors, unauthorized, etc.
HTTPError Does not contain stack trace.
